reviews.review_title: Issue to fix. Main concern is movement
reviews.review_description:
I get that this type of movement is probably the easiest to program. But I think that you could collect more players with the movement similar to the game  “NoClip” where you use left stick to move(walk) and move your hands in a sprinting motion to sprint.
This system to allow for terrifying experience when running from monsters. But also allow for many players to enjoy this game without the annoying usual gorilla tag movement.

This movement isn’t seen as professional and it really doesn’t fit this type of gameplay. I think this game could do great with a change to this NoClip movement rather than the gorilla tag movement.

Another thing is this movement can be used to exploit this type of gameplay in a way that isn’t fair to the game and will only cause more issues. I could easily climb any pillar and wall run and jumping through doors (entries) cause problems.

Either way this game is pretty fun and interesting but usual issues are as follows:
Dark corridors that are TOO dark
Buggy ship movement
Annoying ship shelf. It doesn’t open/close properly
No sounds coming from some monsters
Door with this type of movement cause weird launching problems.
I can climb wall run and do things that this game just shouldn’t allow. It would be better if the movement wa simply a walking standing running movement.
where do i even begin. So many glitchs. 3stars.
this game is very fun but every time i join a server i either get kicked or my screen turns black

reviews.review_title: If your a dev please read this
reviews.review_description: So for an early access game this is pretty well designed, graphics are okay, and there is obviously a ton of bugs. Honestly you should probably get in touch with zeekers(idk if I spelled that correctly) and collab with him. Now for the bugs(yes I know its early access but some of these should be fixed to make the early access at least playable) the only problem with bugs i have had is the ship, players spawn outside the ship sometimes and the ship, and the ship will almost all of the time decide to take off on its own. So I would recclmend making it so the ship cannot take off unless someone pulls the lever or if everyone is dead, at least until you add a time system.

My only complaint is that the time system doesn’t work and it’s kinda lame cause you can get all the scrap you want without the ship leaving or dogs and forest giants rolling up on you. I’m not sure if this is fixed in its newest update called “Light” but when I finally get the time, I’ll def find out with some friends! 😎

When me and my friend play we always go to experimentation and the fire exit never works for my friend and on quest  2 you stick to the ground 
and can’t jump in the facility but those are just some of the bad things of many MANY other things but this game is so fun and I love it but it’s just a little buggy and I can’t wait to play it again.

As of writing this review the game is really buggy and lackluster with important features. For example, the ship is buggy, no inventory system, a really terrible spectator feature, really weird movement where you get stuck most of the time,monsters camping the entrance of the facility, lack of monsters, and always crashing for some reason. This game will definitely get better in the future and will kinda play out like cyberpunk 2077 where it first starts off really buggy but then starts to get really good (the reason why this review is 2 stars and not 1), but as of right now, it really isn't fun to play. Sometimes it can be fun but it's really only because of how ridiculous the glitches, for example, when I was getting chased by the clown, it just went past my friend like he wasn't even there and then I got stuck somehow and died. Basically, just wait for some updates until the game isn't buggy. (P.S i know this game is early access, but this game really needs to be fixed to even be called early access )
